scope.included: Registered Feishu-facing tools and chat commands exposed by the plugin entrypoint.
scope.excluded: Internal helper functions and lower-level channel/outbound APIs not directly registered as tools or commands.

operations.name: get
operations.summary: Get the current user profile or fetch a user profile by ID.

officialLinks.label: GET:/open-apis/im/v1/chats/search
officialLinks.name: 搜索对用户或机器人可见的群列表

operations.name: send
operations.summary: Send a message to a user or chat.

operations.name: reply
operations.summary: Reply to a message, optionally in-thread.

operations.name: download_resource
operations.summary: Download an image or file from an IM message as the user.

officialLinks.label: GET:/open-apis/im/v1/messages/:message_id/resources/:file_key
officialLinks.name: 获取消息中的资源文件

operations.name: list_messages
operations.summary: List chat history for a chat or P2P conversation.

operations.name: search_messages
operations.summary: Search messages across chats and hydrate chat/message context.

operations.name: download_resource
operations.summary: Download an image or file from an IM message as the bot.

officialLinks.label: GET:/open-apis/im/v1/messages/:message_id/resources/:file_key
officialLinks.name: 获取消息中的资源文件

operations.name: create
operations.summary: Create an event and optionally add attendees.

operations.name: list
operations.summary: List event instances in a time range.

officialLinks.label: POST:/open-apis/calendar/v4/freebusy/batch
officialLinks.name: 批量查询主日历日程忙闲信息

operations.name: list
operations.summary: List visible tasks for the current user.

operations.name: tasks
operations.summary: List tasks in a task list.

officialLinks.label: GET:/open-apis/task/v2/tasks/:task_guid/subtasks
officialLinks.name: 获取任务的子任务列表

officialLinks.label: GET:/open-apis/drive/v1/files
officialLinks.name: 获取文件夹中的文件清单

officialLinks.label: GET:/open-apis/drive/v1/files
officialLinks.name: 获取文件夹中的文件清单

operations.name: insert
operations.summary: Upload media and insert it into a doc block.

operations.name: download
operations.summary: Download doc media or whiteboard content.

officialLinks.label: GET:/open-apis/wiki/v2/spaces/:space_id/nodes
officialLinks.name: 获取知识空间子节点列表

operations.name: get
operations.summary: Resolve a wiki node token to the underlying object.

officialLinks.label: GET:/open-apis/wiki/v2/spaces/get_node
officialLinks.name: 获取知识空间节点信息

officialLinks.label: POST:/open-apis/wiki/v2/spaces/:space_id/nodes/:node_token/copy
officialLinks.name: 创建知识空间节点副本

operations.name: create
operations.summary: Create a spreadsheet and optionally seed data.

operations.name: export
operations.summary: Export a spreadsheet via drive export task.

operations.name: create-doc
operations.summary: Create a Feishu doc through remote MCP.

operations.name: fetch-doc
operations.summary: Fetch a Feishu doc through remote MCP.

operations.name: update-doc
operations.summary: Update a Feishu doc through remote MCP.

operations.name: revoke
operations.summary: Revoke the stored user authorization token.

operations.name: authorize_all
operations.summary: Start device-flow authorization for all app-granted user scopes.

operations.name: ask
operations.summary: Send an interactive Feishu card to ask follow-up questions.

commands.summary: Run the richer Feishu doctor report.
Run the doctor report via the unified command.
